creator: chris@senet.com.au
text:
patch-af doesn't work.

During a make (either in /usr/ports/x11/kde2 or 
/usr/ports/converters/kdesupport2), the build process
hangs waiting for input as to the name of the file to patch:

...
===>  Patching for kdesupport-2.0
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for kdesupport-2.0
File to patch: ^C

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/x11/kde2 ; make

OR

cd /usr/ports/converters/kdesupport2 ; make
